result:
All changes have been implemented and verified. Here's a summary of the complete implementation:

## Summary of Changes

### Files Modified:

1. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/Collection.kt`** - Added `redoLabel()` and `redoAvailable()` methods parallel to the existing `undoLabel()` and `undoAvailable()` methods.

2. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Undo.kt`** - Added `redoAndShowSnackbar()` extension function that mirrors `undoAndShowSnackbar()`, using `Collection.redo()` and proper localized messages via `TR.actionsNothingToRedo()` / `TR.undoActionRedone()`.

3. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AbstractFlashcardViewer.kt`** - Added `redo()` method parallel to `undo()`, and added `ViewerCommand.REDO` handling in `executeCommand()`.

4. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`** - Added redo menu item handling in `onOptionsItemSelected()` and redo button configuration (enable/disable, title, visibility) in `onCreateOptionsMenu()`.

5. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`** - Added `REDO` enum value with default keyboard binding `Shift+Z` (complementing `Z` for undo).

6. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/menu/reviewer.xml`** - Added `action_redo` menu item with redo icon, positioned after the undo button.

7. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/ui/RtlCompliantActionProvider.kt`** - Fixed hardcoded `R.id.action_undo` to use `forItem.itemId` so the action provider works correctly for both undo and redo buttons.

8. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/reviewer/ActionButtonStatus.kt`** - Registered the redo button in the custom button system.

9. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/CustomButtonsSettingsFragment.kt`** - Added redo to the reset buttons function.

### Files Created:

10. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/drawable/ic_redo_white.xml`** - Redo icon (horizontally mirrored version of the undo icon).

### String/Preference Resources Modified:

11. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/01-core.xml`** - Added `redo` string resource.

12. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`** - Added `custom_button_redo_key` preference key.

13. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_custom_buttons.xml`** - Added redo button customization preference.

### How it works:

- The redo button appears in the Reviewer toolbar only when a redo action is available (after an undo)
- The button title dynamically shows the action being redone (e.g., "Redo Answer Card")
- Keyboard shortcut `Shift+Z` triggers redo (matching the desktop Anki pattern)
- After redo, a snackbar shows the result message
- The feature leverages the existing backend `Collection.redo()` infrastructure that was already present but not exposed in the UI
